intro: Orthopterygium huaucui, also known as Huacui plant or Huacui root, is a plant species native to the Andean region of South America. The health benefits of Orthopterygium huaucui include its use as an anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic agent, which can help alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The bioactive constituents of this plant include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and alkaloids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Orthopterygium huaucui include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are traditionally used to treat respiratory infections, fever, and skin conditions in the indigenous communities of the Andean region.
